title: 5. Lab: Designing a triage routing agent

blocks.content: Lab: Designing a Triage Routing Agent
In this lab, you will write a complete triage routing program in Python that reads queries, classifies them, and dispatches messages to the appropriate agent worker.

Question 1: Which worker handled the invoice query in the script?
- A) Support Worker
- B) Billing Worker
- C) None

Feedback: Option B is correct. Billing Worker matched the 'invoice' keyword.
